title: Davie's Virtual Clock Operation in Computer Networks
description: This diagram illustrates the key elements and process of Davie's Virtual Clock algorithm, a packet scheduling mechanism used for providing bandwidth guarantees in computer networks.
relationships: Packets arrive tagged with a Flow ID
Virtual Clock value for the flow is calculated based on arrival time and reserved rate
System Virtual Time is maintained and updated
Eligibility of a packet is determined by comparing its VC to the SVT
Eligible packets are scheduled for transmission on the link
